summary:
A shaded 3D computer animation of a colored Soma cube exploding into pieces was created at the University of Utah as part of Gordon Romney's 1969 PhD dissertation, along with shaded renderings of 3D text, 3D graphs, trucks, ships, and buildings.
https://archive.org/details/computerassisted0000unse_p7o2/page/n10/mode/1up
name: Soma Cube animation
